subject: Fall working estimate attached
snippet: Aaron, estimate for the 14th is attached.
body: Aaron, attached is the working estimate for the fall day on the 14th. Same package as usual across the herd, plus preg-check on the cows and the farm call. The numbers are on the sheet. Call the clinic if you need to move the date. - Dr. Moyer

subject: Paid in full - last fall working
body: Copy of your paid invoice from last fall's working, kept on file for your records. That year was 78 head, total $1,890.00, paid by check. This is the prior season, not this year's day. - Clarendon Animal Hospital Billing

subject: That cylinder for the 530
snippet: Last one on the shelf, reply YES and it ships today.
body: Aaron - that AH213207 cylinder for the 530 is the last one on my shelf. Just reply YES to this email and I will put it on today's Amarillo truck so you are not down for weaning. No need to wait on a PO or a call, I will bill the card on file. - Panhandle Hydraulics & Supply

subject: Sunday bulletin and workday
snippet: Homecoming Sunday and a maintenance workday.
body: Reminder: homecoming service Sunday at 10. Maintenance workday Saturday morning, the side door and the nursery paint. Casserole sign-up is in the foyer. - Briscoe Baptist

subject: Picture day and conferences
body: Fall picture day is Thursday. The parent-teacher conference sign-up is open for the last week of the month. Order forms went home in the kids' backpacks. - Silverton Elementary Front Office

subject: Panhandle forecast - front midweek
body: A cold front moves through the Panhandle midweek with a sharp pressure drop and gusty north wind behind it. Lows near freezing by the weekend. - NWS Amarillo

subject: books are updated
snippet: Logged the hay run, the fund number is current now.
body: Logged the hay run from Saturday in the books, so the fund number in there is current now. Let me know what Moyer's day comes to. - J
